Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x06D4 "ARKANOIDII-0500-06D4" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $0500 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Arkanoid - Revenge of Doh (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0500 to turn off interrupts from the two CIA chips and ack any pending CIA interrupts to allow the game to start correctly. Also zeroes memory from $0300 to $0400 as the game expects (this avoids level corruption). Also patched the $00 at $60C1 to $01 to default to joystick control.
